top_signals.title: Russian Oil Flows Hit New High But Slumping Prices Crush Income
top_signals.summary: Urals prices back where they were before US, Israel launched campaign against Iran
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Italy’s Oldest Dairy Taps New Way to Borrow Against Cheese
top_signals.summary: Italy’s oldest dairy company has borrowed money against cheese aging in its warehouse, taking advantage of a law change aimed at helping food and wine producers access finance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bitcoin’s early July bounce rides thin summer liquidity as half of supply still sits underwater: analysts
top_signals.summary: BTC traded around $63,500 after a six-day rally as Wintermute and Bitfinex flagged weak ETF demand, while K33 said 50% of supply is at a loss.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: InsuranceDekho Said to Pick Banks for $400 Million India IPO
top_signals.summary: Indian insurance aggregator InsuranceDekho’s parent has selected HSBC Holdings Plc, Morgan Stanley, ICICI Securities Ltd. and IIFL Capital Services Ltd. as advisers to a potential initial public offering, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: US Trade Deficit Widens to Biggest in More Than a Year
top_signals.summary: The US trade deficit widened in May to the most since March 2025 as exports fell and imports rose.
